title: Lolipop Mace
description: A Lollipop for a Mace Replacement
body:
# Lolipop Mace

Why wield a deadly mace when you can whack your enemies with a giant lollipop? This sweet and silly replacement turns every strike into pure sugary chaos, making battles deliciously ridiculous super!!

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37d109f802550c9303f4acd8bdef696fbeb65973.png)
